params.name: Miss Universe Crown
params.description:
On Jun 28, 1952 AD, the first Miss Universe contest was held in Long Beach, United States.
The Miss Universe Crown can only be worn by the winner of the annual Miss Universe pageant. Since the pageant's inception, sixty-nine of the most outstanding women in the world have been crowned Miss Universe. Contestants from various countries grace the stage to show off their charm. Miss Universe is considered a global fashion icon.
